VAL-CFG-013.details: All 7 required BYOK variables (LLM_PROVIDER, OPENAI_BASE_URL, ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL, OPENROUTER_BASE_URL, OPENAI_DEFAULT_MODEL, ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_MODEL, LLM_TEMPERATURE) are present in .env.example with placeholder values and inline comments. Each variable has a corresponding Field definition in the LLMSettings class in settings.py, confirming 1:1 match.
